---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or API improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? (e.g. parity with tenacity, performance, ergonomics.)

## Proposal

How could it work? (API sketch, example usage.)

## Alternatives

Any alternative designs or libraries you've considered.

## Additional context

Links to tenacity docs, related issues, or prior discussion.
